snippet.title: Minecraft LIVE - March 2026
snippet.description:
New game drops! Developers! More!

It’s time for Minecraft LIVE again! Kick things off with a fun-packed community pre-show, get the scoop on upcoming game drops from our developers, go behind the scenes, meet awesome guests, and discover exciting stuff to come. After the broadcast, stay tuned in for the Deep Dig After Show where our developers and guests show off the new features, often resulting in chaos.

Tune in on March 21 at 10am PT!

snippet.title: ONE SPOON OF CHOCOLATE Official Trailer (2026) Quentin Tarantino Presents, RZA
snippet.description:
Only in theaters May 1, 2026

RZA’S ONE SPOON OF CHOCOLATE follows Unique (Shameik Moore, “Dope” and voice of Miles Morales in the Spider-Verse films), a veteran and ex-convict seeking a fresh start in a small town. After an altercation with a gang of locals, he starts to suspect they may have something to do with the disappearance of young men in the area - including his cousin. 

As he digs for the truth, he finds himself the target of not only the gang, but the local sheriff’s office, whose involvement in the disappearances may be even more sinister. Instead of waiting for his turn to be picked off, Unique and those closest to him (Paris Jackson, RJ Cyler) decide to fight back in this sharply satirical and stylish action thriller from the visionary leader of the Wu-Tang Clan.

snippet.description:

Song by @CG5
Vocals by @CG5 & @LizzieRFreeman
Visuals by @CodaAnim

Follow CG5's social media:
Twitter ▶ http://twitter.com/cg5beats
Twitch ▶ https://www.twitch.tv/cg5music
Spotify ▶ https://sptfy.com/cg5_
Instagram ▶ http://www.instagram.com/cg5beats/

Follow @cg5live105, @cg5instrumentals461, & @cg5covers107
Discord Server ▶ https://discord.gg/CG5

LYRICS: 

Poor poor ringleader,
With the porcelain grin.
Controls a circus,
But he can’t control the kin.

So the spotlight flickers,
And the illusion breaks apart.
But this universe was broken from the start.
In the center of the ring, he says:

“I can fix this, Bubble, it’s like a puzzle.
A problem I need to solve.
I’ll pick up my mess, don’t you move a muscle,
It will be resolved.
Please, please, don’t leave me,
I’ll make life easy,
It’s like you’ll be at home.
Mi casa, su casa,
So don’t leave me alone.
Please?"

He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without a heart.
He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without a heart.
He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without no heart.
A lover, a lover,
A lover-love, without a heart.

Running through this server storm, 
Gotta grit your teeth while the master performs his show.
Taken through hell and back,
Disguised as a digital, colorful, delightful dome.
Gli-gli-glitches getting quicker,
Cuz tooth-face got no tick-tick-ticker.
Why does this computer need friends?
In the center of the ring, he says…

“I can put it all together, I can make it all whatever
I want, so why don’t you care?
Can’t you just play along,
Nothing ever goes wrong.
Anything can be repaired.
Please, please, don’t leave me,
I’ll make life easy,
It’s like you’ll be at home.
Mi casa, su casa,
So don’t leave me alone."

Don’t leave me,
Don’t leave me alone.
I said, don’t leave me.
This show must go on.
Listen, don’t leave me,
Don’t leave me alone.
I said, don’t leave me.
Let’s get this show on the road.

He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without a heart.
He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without a heart.
He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without no heart.
A lover, a lover,
A lover-love, without a heart.

He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without a heart.
He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without a heart.
He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without no heart.
A lover, a lover,
A lover-love, without a heart.

snippet.title: "Brand New Day" Looks SPECTACULAR
snippet.description:
Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/troyoboyo17
Fortnite Creator Code: TROYOBOYO17
Become a Member for $1: https://www.youtube.com/c/troyoboyo17/join
Twitter: https://www.twitter.com/troyoboyo17
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/troyoboyo17
Merch: https://troyoboyo17-shop.fourthwall.com

Causes That Matter to Me: https://troyoboyo17.notion.site/With-Great-Power-9b83d5c7e8294dd59cf4e16a099187a0

So, the first trailer for Spider-Man: Brand New Day just released. And it looks really exciting. Thw suit is absolutely gorgeous, I love referencing different iconic comic covers. And I really dig the darker tone that they’re going for with Tom Holland in comparison to the brighter and more fun “Home Trilogy.” Director Destin Daniel Cretton has really impressed me with his other work in the MCU like Shang Chi and Wonder Man, and from the looks of things it seems like he truly understands Spider-Man and what makes him so special.

     I’m gonna try not to get my hopes up too much though. You know how trailers go, if you get too excited you’re inevitably gonna set yourself up for disappoint—

Oh my god Scorpion is back? And Keith David is in it?

Ok yeah this is gonna be a 10 out of 10.
